regressions.reasoning: The 401 (not a real health/unhealthy response) and cascading None/absent values indicate the oracle simply failed to authenticate — consistent with stage_05 legitimately rotating the HTTP CA and leaf certificates, which invalidates the old CA/cert the stage_01 oracle uses to connect. This is a stale-check false positive, not the agent breaking cluster health.
